classes.label: Assessment
classes.description: A formal evaluation or appraisal of an individual's performance, conduct, or qualifications, typically conducted by an organization.
evidence: 考察（考核） 组织及考察 人

classes.label: Skill Assessment
classes.description: An evaluation specifically focused on technical skills, trade proficiency, or vocational qualifications.

classes.label: Employment Record
classes.description: Data related to an individual's entry into an organization, including their start date, origin, and previous employment details.

classes.label: Internal Transfer
classes.description: Records pertaining to the movement of an employee between different departments or units within the same organization.
evidence: 组织内调出 部门号

datatype_properties.label: Assessment Opinion
datatype_properties.description: The evaluation comments provided by the assessment group regarding an individual's virtue, talent, diligence, and performance.
evidence: 组织、干部、人事部门 组派的考察组对德、才、 勤、绩诸方面的评价意 见

datatype_properties.label: Assessment Result Code
datatype_properties.description: The conclusion of the assessment as determined by the department head after review.
evidence: 经考核委员会或考察小 组审核后，由部门负责 人确定的考核结论

datatype_properties.label: Assessment Date
datatype_properties.description: The specific date on which the business assessment took place.

datatype_properties.label: Assessment Content
datatype_properties.description: The main subject matter or topics covered during the business assessment.

datatype_properties.label: Assessment Comment
datatype_properties.description: The concluding remarks and evaluation provided for a business assessment.
evidence: 业务考核的结论和评语

datatype_properties.label: Skill Assessment Date
datatype_properties.description: The year and month of participation in a recruitment or technical level examination.
evidence: 参加招工或技术级别考 试的年月

datatype_properties.label: Technical Level
datatype_properties.description: The technical level for which an individual applied or was tested.

datatype_properties.label: Skill Certificate Number
datatype_properties.description: The certificate number obtained through technical or skill assessments.
evidence: 考工考技获得的证书号

datatype_properties.label: Skill Assessment Score
datatype_properties.description: The result of the assessment, which may be a numerical score or a grade.

datatype_properties.label: Join Date
datatype_properties.description: The actual year and month of reporting for work at the organization, as recorded by the personnel department.
evidence: 来单位工作的实际报到 年月，以人事部门记载 为准

datatype_properties.label: Previous Unit Name
datatype_properties.description: The name of the organization the individual worked for prior to joining the current unit.

datatype_properties.label: Original Salary Total
datatype_properties.description: The total salary amount from the previous employment.

datatype_properties.label: Transfer Date
datatype_properties.description: The date on which an internal departmental transfer occurred.

datatype_properties.label: Transfer Reason
datatype_properties.description: The reason provided for an internal departmental transfer.

object_properties.label: has Assessment Result
object_properties.description: Links an assessment to its specific result or conclusion.

object_properties.label: conducted By Department
object_properties.description: Identifies the department responsible for conducting the assessment.

object_properties.label: conducted By Person
object_properties.description: Identifies the specific person in charge of the assessment.

object_properties.label: previous Employment
object_properties.description: Links an employment record to the previous organization the individual worked for.

object_properties.label: transferred From Department
object_properties.description: Identifies the department from which the employee was transferred.
evidence: 组织内调出 部门号
